name: UnClick
description: One MCP install that gives AI agents 450+ callable endpoints across 60+ integrations plus persistent cross-session memory, with XPass verification checks. Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible client.

tools.name: unclick_search
tools.description: Search for tools by keyword or description

tools.name: unclick_browse
tools.description: Browse all available tools, optionally filtered by category

tools.name: unclick_tool_info
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific tool including endpoints and parameters

tools.name: unclick_call
tools.description: Call any tool endpoint with parameters
